posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
See discussion here: Gift registry form tool

Introduce a form field that allows users to select from multiple options, each with a predefined availability count. As selections are made and forms are submitted, the availability of each option decreases accordingly, preventing over-selection and ensuring real-time inventory management.

Key Features:

  1. Multi-Select Capability: Users can choose one or more items from a list of options.
  2. Customizable Limits: Each option has a set quantity limit, representing its availability.
  3. Real-Time Availability Tracking: Upon form submission, the selected item’s availability decreases automatically. Once an item reaches zero availability, it becomes unavailable for future selections.
